issues.offending_span: Revenue generation is driven by booking fees from both hosts and guests utilizing the platform
issues.explanation: The claim that revenue is driven by booking fees from both hosts and guests is not supported by any of the cited evidence chunks. C001 and C002 describe the platform and company profile but do not detail the revenue model or fee structure. K001 provides revenue figures and growth rates but does not describe the source of revenue.
issues.recommended_fix: Remove the specific description of the revenue model (booking fees from both hosts and guests) as it is not present in the provided evidence, or cite a specific source (e.g., Financial Statements or Business Model section) that explicitly confirms this fee structure.
